dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Statistics / Users / Sales / Analytics / Remna_Nodes
dashboard.no_access_warning: [WARNING]: You have no access to any section. Contact the administrator.
dashboard.no_node_access: No access to Remna node management. Contact the administrator.
dashboard.nodes_not_loaded: Nodes not loaded or Remna API not configured. Check settings.

clients.title: Clients
clients.password_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters
clients.squads_empty: Squad list empty or Remna not configured

tariffs.title: Tariffs
tariffs.subtitle: Tariff categories and tariffs with duration (1–360 days), squads, and limits
tariffs.remna_not_configured: Remna API not configured. Squads for tariffs are pulled from Remna — configure REMNA_API_URL and REMNA_ADMIN_TOKEN in the backend.
tariffs.no_categories: No categories. Create a tariff category, then add tariffs (1–360 days, squads, limits).
tariffs.no_tariffs: No tariffs. Click "Tariff" to add (name, duration in days, squads, traffic and device limits).
tariffs.name: Name
tariffs.squads_empty: Squad list empty or Remna not configured
tariffs.traffic_limit_hint: 1 GB = 1024³ bytes (GiB). The limit is sent to Remna in bytes.
tariffs.traffic_no_reset_hint: Traffic does not reset — the limit applies for the entire tariff duration.
tariffs.traffic_reset_month_hint: Traffic resets monthly (Remna MONTH). E.g.: 10 GB/mo for 3 months.
tariffs.traffic_reset_rolling_hint: Traffic resets 30 days from the last reset (Remna MONTH_ROLLING).

backup.title: Backups
backup.subtitle: Create and restore database backups. Backups are saved on the server by day.
backup.created_success: Backup created, saved on server, and downloaded.
backup.create_hint: Creates a DB dump, saves it on the server (by day), and provides the file for download.
backup.restore_file_hint: Upload an SQL file from your computer. Current data will be replaced.
backup.select_file: Select a backup file with .sql extension
backup.auto_telegram_hint: Automatic SQL backup delivery to a Telegram group on a schedule. Configure the "Auto-backups" topic in Settings → Notifications.
backup.auto_schedule_hint: Backup is sent to Telegram group on a cron schedule
backup.saved_hint: Backups by day. Download or restore from selected.
backup.no_backups: No saved backups. Create the first one.
backup.restore_file_warning: Current database data will be replaced with the selected file content. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restore_server_warning: The database will be replaced with the selected backup. This action cannot be undone.

promo.title: Promo Links
promo.subtitle: Create promo links to distribute free subscriptions through the bot.
promo.no_groups_hint: Create the first promo link to distribute subscriptions.
promo.no_activations: No one has activated this promo code yet.
promo.name: Name
promo.delete_confirm: Delete promo group? All activations will be deleted.

promo_codes.title: Promo Codes
promo_codes.subtitle: Promo codes for payment discounts or free subscription days.
promo_codes.not_used: Promo code has not been used yet.
promo_codes.name: Name / description
promo_codes.delete_confirm: Delete promo code? All usage data will be deleted.

marketing.title: Marketing & Analytics
marketing.subtitle: Traffic source tracking settings (UTM), counters, and useful advertising links.
marketing.useful_links_hint: Main links for mailings, advertising, and UTM templates. Insert your referral code or campaign parameters.
marketing.referral_link_hint: Replace REFERRAL_CODE with the client's referral code from the "Referrals" section
marketing.bot_referral_campaign_hint: Referral code and campaign tag in one link
marketing.ready_links_hint: Example links with UTM tags for different channels. Copy and change campaign name if needed.
marketing.utm_tracking_hint: The system remembers where the user came from (ads, mailing, blogger) and links it to registration and payments.
marketing.utm_analytics_hint: Registrations, trials, payments, and revenue by traffic source (90-day data).
marketing.no_utm_data: No source data. Use UTM links or bot with `start=c_source_campaign` — statistics will appear after registrations and payments.
marketing.ga4_hint: Enter Measurement ID (format G-XXXXXXXXXX). The counter will be automatically connected on cabinet pages (login, registration, dashboard).
marketing.ga4_setup_hint: Settings → Data → Data Streams → Web → Measurement ID.
marketing.yandex_hint: Enter counter number. Counter code will be automatically connected on cabinet pages.
marketing.yandex_setup_hint: Create a counter in Yandex.Metrika, copy the number from counter settings.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.subtitle: Send message to clients via Telegram and/or email
broadcast.recipients_hint: Recipients: clients with specified telegram_id or email.
broadcast.message_placeholder: Enter broadcast text. HTML is supported for Telegram.
broadcast.attachment: Image or file (optional, up to {MB} MB)
broadcast.attachment_hint: In Telegram: images as photos with caption, other files as documents. In email — attachment.
broadcast.button_hint: Select an action — an inline button will appear under the message, opening the selected bot section.
broadcast.sent_details: Telegram: sent {sentTelegram}, errors {failedTelegram}. Email: sent {sentEmail}, errors {failedEmail}.

auto_broadcast.title: Auto Broadcast
auto_broadcast.subtitle: Configurable rules: post-registration, inactivity, no payment — to retain clients
auto_broadcast.cron_hint: Cron: minute hour day month weekday. E.g. `0 9 * * *` — every day at 9:00. Empty = default 9:00.
auto_broadcast.no_rules: No rules yet. Add the first one.
auto_broadcast.name: Name
auto_broadcast.trigger_trial_no_pay: Used trial but did not pay
auto_broadcast.multi_rule_hint: Create multiple rules (e.g., 7, 3, 1 day before) — broadcast will use the appropriate text.
auto_broadcast.message_hint: Text for Telegram / email (up to 4096 characters)

contests.title: Contests
contests.no_contests: No contests. Create the first one.
contests.name: Name
contests.daily_broadcast_hint: Message the bot will send daily during the contest

video.title: Video Instructions
video.subtitle: Video buttons in the Telegram bot "Support" section
video.enabled_hint: "Instructions" button is shown in the "Support" section
video.file_id_explanation: Send a video to the bot. The bot will reply with a file_id to insert when adding an instruction. You can also forward a video from any chat — the bot will return the file_id.

traffic_abuse.title: Traffic Analysis
traffic_abuse.subtitle: Search for users with abnormally high consumption
traffic_abuse.all_normal: All users within acceptable traffic consumption

admins.title: Managers
admins.subtitle: Create managers and assign access only to required admin sections.
admins.user_list_hint: Admin has full access. Manager has access only to selected sections.
admins.new_password_hint: New password (leave empty to keep current)

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.first_login_hint: You must change your password on first login.
change_password.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
change_password.min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Languages, currencies, trial and parameters for bot, Mini App, and website
settings.general_subtitle: Name, logo, ticket system, languages, and currencies
settings.ticket_hint: "Tickets" section in the cabinet (site and mini-app) and "🎫 Tickets" button in the bot — support requests and correspondence.
settings.popup_hint: Short notifications about new registrations, top-ups, payments, and tickets in the admin panel.
settings.ai_chat_hint: Enable the built-in AI assistant in the cabinet (chat icon). If disabled — chat is completely hidden.
settings.notification_group_hint: If you specify a group or channel Chat ID, all admin notifications will be duplicated there. Add the bot to the group. Supergroup IDs usually start with -100.
settings.topics_hint: Specify topic ID (message_thread_id) so different notification types go to different group threads. Leave empty — notifications go to general chat.
settings.service_name_hint: Displayed in admin header and client cabinet
settings.bot_logo_hint: Photo or GIF in the Telegram bot welcome message. Only this image is used; the site logo is not substituted in the bot
settings.app_url_hint: Without trailing slash. Used to generate email confirmation link, payment redirects, and Platega callback.
settings.2fa_hint: Two-factor authentication — login with a code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) after entering your password.
settings.bot_subtitle: Order, visibility, and labels of the Telegram bot main menu buttons. The "Back to menu" button is shown on tariff, profile, and top-up screens.
settings.bot_back_hint: Text for the main menu return button
settings.bot_support_hint: Links for the "Support" button in the bot. Inside — 4 sub-items: Tech support, Agreements, Offer, Instructions.
settings.bot_tariff_fields: What to show in tariff row
settings.bot_emojis_hint: Change Unicode and TG ID (premium) for each key — they will be used in menu buttons and message text. Equivalent of EMOJI_* / EMOJI_*_TG_ID from remnawave env.
settings.bot_emojis_premium_warn: Premium emojis (TG ID) are only displayed if the bot owner has Telegram Premium (the account that created the bot in @BotFather). Otherwise only Unicode will be shown.
settings.bot_menu_hint: Toggle visibility, edit text, select emoji by key (from the block above), set order. Style: primary / success / danger or empty.
settings.bot_buttons_per_row_default: Default: one button per row, as is.
settings.bot_one_per_row_hint: "One per row" — button always occupies its own line. Other buttons follow the "Buttons per row" setting above.
settings.bot_inner_styles_hint: Button colors inside sections: tariffs, top-up, "Back", profile, trial, language, currency. Values: primary / success / danger or empty.
settings.bot_welcome_hint: Captions and phrases of the bot main menu.
settings.bot_tariffs_hint: Text that the user sees in the "Tariffs" section.
settings.bot_force_hint: If enabled — the user won't be able to use the bot until they subscribe to the specified channel/group. The bot must be an admin of the channel/group.
settings.bot_channel_hint: Enter @username (e.g. @my_channel) or the numeric ID of the channel/group.
settings.bot_unsub_placeholder: To use the bot, subscribe to our channel
settings.bot_unsub_hint: Text the user will see. If empty — default text will be used.
settings.bot_blacklist_hint: If enabled — the bot automatically blocks users from the community blacklist. The list is updated by the community and cached for 30 minutes.
settings.trial_traffic_hint: 1 GB = 1024³ bytes (GiB). Same as tariffs — limit is sent to Remna in bytes.
settings.trial_subtitle: Trial period parameters for new users
settings.referral_subtitle: Percentage of top-ups by level: 1 — invited by you; 2 — invited by your referrals; 3 — invited by level 2 referrals.
settings.referral_level_1: Level 1 (%) — from top-ups of your invitees
settings.auto_renew_hint: Enable auto-renewal (balance deduction) for new clients by default. Users can disable this in their cabinet.
settings.payment_methods_hint: Enable required methods and set button label for clients
settings.yookassa_recurring_disabled: To enable, first configure YooKassa (Shop ID and secret key) in the Payments tab.
settings.yookassa_recurring_hint: When paying via YooKassa, the payment method is saved. During auto-renewal, balance is charged first, then the saved card.
settings.renew_days_hint: How many days before subscription expiry to attempt charging
settings.notify_days_hint: How many days before to notify the client about upcoming charge (if balance is low)
settings.grace_period_hint: How many days after subscription expiry to continue charge attempts
settings.max_retries_hint: How many times to attempt charging with insufficient funds before disabling auto-renewal
settings.platega_callback_note: Callback URL is configured below (using domain from settings)
settings.platega_callback_hint: Uses "App URL" from the General tab. Set it there and paste this callback in the Platega dashboard.
settings.yoomoney_webhook_hint: Enter this URL in the YoMoney wallet HTTP notification settings.
settings.yoomoney_desc: Balance top-up via card payment only (YoMoney form). Enter the wallet number and webhook secret.
settings.yoomoney_wallet_hint: Funds are credited to this wallet when topping up via YoMoney.
settings.yoomoney_secret_hint: Set in the wallet HTTP notification settings.
settings.yookassa_webhook_hint: In YooKassa dashboard, enable notifications and enter this URL (payment.succeeded event).
settings.yookassa_desc: Accept card and SBP payments via YooKassa API. Enter the shop ID and secret key from API settings.
settings.yookassa_key_hint: Do not share the key with third parties.
settings.cryptopay_register: Create an app in @CryptoBot → Crypto Pay → Create App and enter the webhook URL below.
settings.cryptopay_webhook_hint: In @CryptoBot → Crypto Pay → My Apps → your app → Webhooks enter this URL.
settings.cryptopay_desc: Accept cryptocurrency payments (USDT, TON, etc.) via Crypto Pay API. Amount in USD, RUB, EUR, etc. — user pays in crypto at exchange rate.
settings.cryptopay_token_hint: From @CryptoBot → Crypto Pay → My Apps → your app → API Token.
settings.cryptopay_testnet_hint: For testing use @CryptoTestnetBot and enable this flag.
settings.heleket_register: In the Heleket dashboard, get the Merchant ID and API Key, enter the webhook URL below.
settings.heleket_webhook_hint: In the Heleket dashboard, enter this URL in the payment callback settings.
settings.heleket_desc: Accept cryptocurrency payments via Heleket API. Amount in USD, RUB, etc. — user pays in USDT at exchange rate.
settings.heleket_merchant_hint: Merchant UUID from the Heleket dashboard.
settings.heleket_key_hint: Secret key for signing requests and webhooks.
settings.ai_subtitle: Smart AI assistant settings for the built-in support chat on the site and mini-app.
settings.ai_integration_hint: Integration works via Groq API, providing access to open models (Llama 3, Mixtral) at the highest speed.
settings.ai_key_hint: Key from the Groq console. If not specified, the chat will work in stub (test) mode.
settings.ai_model_hint: Select a model. Recommended: Llama 3.3 70B or DeepSeek R1 70B.
settings.ai_fallback_hint: With a free Groq account, there are strict rate limits. If the main model doesn't respond due to limits, we'll automatically switch to the next model in the list.
settings.ai_prompt_hint: This instruction sets the role, tone, and behavior of the bot. Describe here how it should respond to clients.
settings.smtp_subtitle: Mail server settings for sending confirmation links during email registration.
settings.smtp_no_confirm_hint: if enabled — the user registers immediately, no email is sent
settings.telegram_bot_hint: Bot for login and registration via Telegram. Enter bot username (without @) — the "Login via Telegram" button will appear on login and registration pages.
settings.telegram_admins_hint: Users with these Telegram IDs will see an "Admin Panel" button in the bot (link to web panel).
settings.subpage_editor_hint: Visual editor: enable or disable apps for iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, Linux and change order by dragging.
settings.subpage_remna_hint: If enabled — the "Connect to VPN" button in the bot leads to the Remna subscription page instead of the cabinet.
settings.theme_user_choice_hint: If enabled, clients can choose their own interface color in the cabinet. If disabled — everyone will have the color selected below, and the color change button will be hidden.
settings.theme_global_hint: Choose a color theme that will be applied to the entire site: admin panel, client cabinet, and mini app. The dark/light toggle is always available in the header.
settings.options_subtitle: Additional traffic, devices, and servers (squads) — clients can purchase them after subscribing.
settings.options_squads_hint: Squads from Remna (Sync tab). Select a squad and set the price.
settings.custom_build_subtitle: Client selects number of days (1–360), devices, and optionally traffic. Price is calculated by formula.
settings.custom_build_hint: The custom tariff will appear in the client cabinet menu only if it is enabled and a squad is selected.
settings.oauth_google_hint: Requires a Google Cloud Console project with OAuth 2.0 Client ID
settings.oauth_google_secret_hint: In Google Cloud Console → Credentials → your OAuth 2.0 Client ID → in the "Client secret" block click "Show" or create a new secret. For the "Sign in with Google" button on the site, the secret is optional.
settings.oauth_google_origins_hint: In Authorized JavaScript origins, add the application domain. Redirect URI for id_token is not needed.
settings.oauth_apple_hint: Requires an Apple Developer account and Services ID
settings.oauth_apple_desc: In Apple Developer: create a Services ID (specify domain and return URL). Register a Sign In with Apple key and download the .p8 file.
settings.oauth_title: OAuth — Login via Google and Apple
settings.oauth_subtitle: Set up client authorization via Google and Apple. Buttons will appear on login and registration pages.
settings.landing_subtitle: If enabled, the landing page (info, tariffs, contacts) is shown at /. Registration leads to the cabinet. Otherwise the home page redirects to cabinet/login.
settings.landing_hero_subtitle: Subtitle (hero) — main text under the title
settings.landing_hero_empty_hint: If empty — the placeholder text above is shown on the landing page.
settings.landing_hero_cta: CTA button text (e.g.: Register / Go to cabinet)
settings.landing_faq_json: FAQ block — questions (JSON: array of objects with q and a fields)
settings.landing_offer_hint: If empty — the general "Offer" setting from the Support section is used.
settings.landing_privacy_hint: If empty — the "Agreement" from the Support section is used.
settings.landing_payment_text: Payment methods tile text (if not set)
settings.ssh_subtitle: Manage SSH access to the server. Changes are applied immediately.
settings.ssh_warning: Warning: incorrect settings may lock you out of the server.
settings.ssh_not_found: SSH config not found. Make sure the container has access to host /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
settings.proxy_subtitle: Proxy server configuration for outgoing requests to Telegram API and payment systems.
settings.nalog_subtitle: Automatic receipt submission to "My Tax" (lknpd.nalog.ru) for YooKassa payments.
settings.nalog_selfemployed_hint: For self-employed — income registration and receipt issuance to the buyer.
settings.nalog_enabled_hint: Upon YooKassa payment, a receipt will automatically be created in "My Tax"
settings.nalog_service_name_hint: Text that will appear in the receipt (if empty — tariff name will be used)
settings.nalog_device_id_hint: Unique device identifier for API. Default: stealthnet-bot-nalog
settings.nalog_how_1: Upon successful YooKassa payment, a receipt is automatically created in "My Tax"
settings.nalog_how_2: The receipt contains the payment amount and service name
settings.nalog_how_3: If receipt creation fails — payment still goes through, the error is logged
settings.nalog_how_4: Authorization tokens are saved and refreshed automatically
settings.map_subtitle: Interactive map displaying nodes, connected clients, and traffic.
settings.map_enabled_hint: Show the "Node Map" section in the navigation menu
settings.map_cache_ttl_hint: How often to refresh map data (minimum 10 sec). Higher values reduce Remnawave API load.
settings.map_maxmind_hint: Path to MaxMind database file inside the container. If empty — ./data/GeoLite2-City.mmdb is used. Without MaxMind, ip-api.com will be used (45 requests/min limit).
settings.map_maxmind_3: Place the file in the container at the specified path (via volume)
settings.map_maxmind_4: Without MaxMind, the map will use ip-api.com — slower, but free
settings.sync_subtitle: Load users from Remna to panel, send data to Remna, or bind clients without Remna.
settings.2fa_scan_hint: Scan the QR code in an authenticator app or enter the key manually.
settings.2fa_enter_code: Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm.
settings.2fa_disable_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app to disable.
settings.2fa_enter_code_error: Enter the 6-digit code from the app

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.subtitle: Nodes, categories, and tariffs for selling proxy access.
proxy.node_list_hint: Proxy node list. "Online" status — node sent heartbeat in the last 5 minutes.
proxy.no_nodes: No nodes. Click "Add proxy", copy docker-compose to the server, and start the container.
proxy.user_slots_hint: All issued slots. You can change login/password, connection limit, revoke, or delete.
proxy.categories_hint: Categories group tariffs (e.g., "Russia Proxy", "EU Proxy"). Each category has its own tariffs.
proxy.no_categories: No categories. Create a category, then add tariffs (proxy count, duration, price).
proxy.no_category_tariffs: No tariffs in this category. Click "Tariff" to add.

singbox.title: Sing-box
singbox.subtitle: VLESS / Shadowsocks / Trojan / Hysteria2 nodes. Categories and tariffs for selling access.
singbox.select_node_hint: Click on a node — details and config
singbox.category_groups: Tariff groups for the access store
singbox.no_categories: No categories. Add a category, then tariffs.
singbox.tariffs_by_category: Tariffs by category. Clients purchase by singboxTariffId.

layout.2fa_description: Enter the 6-digit two-factor authentication code to sign in.
layout.2fa_error_enter_code: Enter the 6-digit code from your app

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.telegram_fallback: Telegram didn't open? Sign in via web

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Create your account
register.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.email_sent: A confirmation link has been sent to your email. Click it to complete registration.
register.telegram_fallback: Telegram didn't open? Sign in via web

dashboard.sub_active_desc: Your subscription is active. Connect to VPN and enjoy unrestricted internet.
dashboard.sub_inactive_desc: Connect to VPN — choose a plan and pay directly on the website.
dashboard.no_subscription_desc: You don't have an active subscription yet. Go to Tariffs to choose and pay for access.
dashboard.connection_desc: Tap the button below — the apps page with 1-click setup will open.
dashboard.link_after_payment: The link will appear after paying for a plan. Go to the Tariffs tab and pay.

tariffs.title: Tariffs
tariffs.subtitle: Choose a suitable plan and pay.
tariffs.empty:
No plans published yet.
Contact support.
tariffs.error_yoomoney_rub: YooMoney only accepts rubles. Choose a RUB tariff or pay with Platega card.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Personal data and settings
profile.top_up_opens_tab: Payment will open in a new tab
profile.referral_invite_hint: Invite friends — get a bonus on registration
profile.2fa_setup_scan_qr: Scan the QR code in your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
profile.2fa_setup_enter_code: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to complete setup.
profile.2fa_error_enter_code: Enter the 6-digit code from the app
profile.2fa_disable_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm disabling.
profile.change_password_desc: Enter your current password and create a new one.
profile.change_password_error_min: New password must be at least 6 characters
profile.devices_no_sub_hint: Choose and pay a tariff to connect devices.
profile.devices_error_hint: Try refreshing the page or contact support.
profile.devices_empty_hint: Connect to VPN via the app and your device will appear here.
profile.devices_disconnect_hint: Disconnect a device to free up a slot for another:

referral.title: Referrals
referral.subtitle: Invite friends — earn a percentage from their payments

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.empty_tariffs: Proxy tariffs are not set up yet. Contact support.
proxy.no_active: You don't have active proxies yet.

singbox.title: Access Keys
singbox.empty_tariffs: Access key tariffs are not set up yet.
singbox.no_active: You don't have active access keys yet.
